summary: Comprehensive testing of Wild Machine rebranding and new features completed. Backend: 13/14 tests passed (93%). Frontend: All branding, filter, and dashboard features verified working.

minor.issue: Health endpoint returns 404 - endpoint does not exist

issues: Minor console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement

passed_tests: ✅ Header shows 'Wild Machine' branding with gold accent
✅ Hero section shows 'Wild Machine' text
✅ Footer shows 'Wild Machine', support@wildmachine.com, © 2025 Wild Machine
✅ Age Gate displays 'Wild Machine' branding
✅ Page title: 'Wild Machine - Premium Escort Directory'
✅ Meta description contains 'Wild Machine'
✅ Listing detail page title contains 'Wild Machine'
✅ NO 'Pink Lantern' text anywhere on UI
✅ NO Emergent badge or scripts in HTML
✅ Filters panel has Car Call switch
✅ Filters panel has En Ligne (Online) switch
✅ Filters panel has Trans switch
✅ City dropdown shows Quebec cities (Montréal, Laval, Longueuil, etc.)
✅ NO old cities (Toronto, Vancouver, Paris, Shanghai) in data
✅ Listing cards display Car Call badges
✅ Listing cards display Online badges
✅ Listing cards display Trans badges
✅ Backend API: GET /api/listings supports car_call filter
✅ Backend API: GET /api/listings supports en_ligne filter
✅ Backend API: GET /api/listings supports is_trans filter
✅ Backend API: POST /api/listings creates listings with car_call, en_ligne, is_trans
✅ Backend API: Listings response includes new service fields
✅ Admin login works with admin@wildmachine.com
✅ Escort login works with escort1@wildmachine.com
✅ Escort Dashboard form has Car Call switch
✅ Escort Dashboard form has En Ligne (Online) switch
✅ Escort Dashboard form has Trans switch
✅ Edit Listing form has all new service switches
✅ 14 Quebec cities present in seed data
seed_data_creation: Database was re-seeded with 14 Quebec cities and new wildmachine.com email domains
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wild Machine rebranding complete. All Pink Lantern and Emergent references removed. New service types (car_call, en_ligne, is_trans) working in API and UI. 14 Quebec cities in seed data. Login selectors: data-testid='login-email-input', data-testid='login-password-input', data-testid='login-submit-btn'. Age gate bypass: click [data-testid='age-gate-enter-btn'].
